raw_consumer_statement: The lender opened this account to an unknown person using my identity and they have assigned this debt to me. I had no knowledge of this account until recently, I did not apply for this account, nor have I received a credit card belonging to this account. Attempts to resolve this issue began with multiple phone calls to the lender without any resolution. Attached are ( XXXX ) letters sent to the collection agency, who have closed their account with the lender. Attached is a letter to the supposed review service that works for the lender. Attached is a credit card statement detailing the purchases. Also attached is a letter of complaint with further details concerning this fraudulent account.
